account.body: Your profile, password, two-factor authentication, and organization settings are managed in the Vectros Admin app.
account.title: Account & security
addDocument.error: We couldn't add this document. Please check your input and try again.
addDocument.existingUnchanged: A document with this external ID already exists, so it was returned unchanged — your title and text were NOT applied. Turn on “Update it if it already exists” and submit again to overwrite it, or open the existing document to edit it.
addDocument.externalIdHelp: Your own stable identifier. Repeating a create with the same external ID returns the existing document instead of duplicating it, other records can reference it, and for files it enables “Replace file” later.
addDocument.upsert: Update it if it already exists (overwrite title, text, and metadata)
addDocument.fileTooLarge: This file is larger than the 100 MB limit. Choose a smaller file.
addDocument.storeTextHelp: On (default): the text extracted from the file stays retrievable and answerable by AI Q&A. Off: it's discarded once indexing finishes — search and the original-file download keep working, but the text can't be read back or asked about. Fixed at upload.
addDocument.title: Add document
ai.modelLoadError: Couldn't load the model list. The default model will be used.
ai.modelEmpty: No inference models are available for this tenant.
ai.title: AI workspace
ai.subtitle: Chat with a model, or ask questions grounded in this context's data.
ai.chat.empty: Start a conversation. Messages aren't saved — they live only in this session.
ai.chat.errorTitle: The model couldn't respond. Please try again.
ai.ask.placeholder: Ask a question about this context's data…
ai.ask.empty: Ask a question — answers are grounded in this context's records and documents, with citations.
ai.ask.errorTitle: Couldn't answer your question. Please try again.
ai.ask.citationsNote: Sources aren't click-through yet — linking arrives with a backend update.
ai.ask.noCitations: No sources were retrieved for this answer.
ai.ask.truncated: Some retrieved sources were trimmed to fit the context window ({used} of {requested} used).
ai.docAsk.title: Ask this document
ai.docAsk.placeholder: Ask a question about this document…
ai.docAsk.empty: Ask a question about this document's contents.
ai.docAsk.errorTitle: Couldn't answer your question. Please try again.
auth.errors.CODE_MISMATCH: The code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.errors.EXPIRED_CODE: That code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
auth.errors.LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.errors.NETWORK_ERROR: A network problem occurred. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errors.PASSWORD_POLICY_VIOLATION: Your password does not meet the requirements.
auth.errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errors.USER_NOT_CONFIRMED: Your email is not yet confirmed. Please check your inbox for the verification code.
context.emptyOwnerBody: The data plane works inside a data context — a workspace that holds your records, schemas, folders, and documents. Your account doesn't have one yet. Create and manage data contexts in the admin app, then come back here to explore them.
context.emptySubUserBody: You don't have access to a data context yet. Ask an administrator to grant you access to one, or to provision a new context.
context.errorBody: We couldn't load the contexts you have access to. Please refresh and try again.
documentDetail.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes the document and its extracted text and index. This can't be undone from here.
documentDetail.deleteError: We couldn't delete this document. Please try again.
documentDetail.downloadError: We couldn't generate a download link. Please try again.
documentDetail.error: We couldn't load this document. It may not exist, or you may not have access to it in this context.
documentDetail.archiveConfirmBody: “{title}” will be pulled from search and AI recall, but kept and fully retrievable. You can restore it at any time.
documentDetail.archiveError: We couldn't archive this document. Please try again.
documentDetail.archivedBanner: This document is archived — it's excluded from search and AI recall. Restore it to make it searchable again.
documentDetail.fileViewError: We couldn't load the file for viewing. Try downloading the original instead.
documentDetail.fileViewIntro: This document's content is stored as its original file.
documentDetail.replaceFileError: We couldn't replace the file. Please try again.
documentDetail.replaceFileNoExternalId: Replacing the file needs an external ID, and this document was created without one. Re-uploads are matched to the existing document by external ID.
documentDetail.replaceFileSuccess: New file uploaded. Text extraction and re-indexing run in the background — the Index status updates as they complete.
documentDetail.restoreError: We couldn't restore this document. Please try again.
documentDetail.textError: We couldn't load the extracted text.
documentDetail.textNotStored: Extracted text isn't stored for this document.
documentForm.notEditableHere: These fields can't be edited here:
documentEdit.conflictBody: Someone (or another tab) saved a newer version since you opened this. Reload to start from the latest, or overwrite to save your changes anyway.
documentEdit.conflictTitle: This document changed since you opened it
documentEdit.error: We couldn't save this document. Please try again.
documentEdit.title: Edit document
documents.askFolderAria: Ask a question scoped to the {name} folder
documents.empty: This context has no documents yet.
documents.emptyFolder: No documents in the selected folder.
documents.emptyType: No documents of this type in the current view.
documents.error: We couldn't load documents. Please refresh and try again.
documents.folderDeleteBody: Delete the folder “{name}”? This can't be undone from here.
documents.folderDeleteNonEmpty: This folder isn't empty. Move or delete its documents and sub-folders first, or the delete will be rejected.
documents.folderDeleteNonEmptyError: This folder still contains items, so it can't be deleted. Empty it (move or delete its documents and sub-folders) first.
documents.folderDeleteError: We couldn't delete this folder. Please try again.
documents.foldersError: We couldn't load this context's folders. Please refresh and try again.
documents.lookupError: We couldn't run this lookup. Please try again.
documents.subtitle: Browse the documents in the selected context. Pick a type to see its documents with their metadata, filter by folder or look them up by a field, then open a document to read it in the app or download the original.
documents.title: Documents
folderEditor.error: We couldn't save this folder. Please try again.
history.empty: No history yet — changes appear here as this is edited.
history.more: Showing the most recent changes — earlier history exists.
history.subtitle: Audit trail — every change, who made it, and when. Sensitive fields stay redacted.
history.title: History
home.contextsErrorBody: We couldn't load the contexts you have access to. Please refresh and try again.
home.heading: Welcome
home.intro: Browse, search, and reason over your data in {productName} — scoped to the context you select.
home.nextStepsBody: Pick a context, then explore its records, schemas, folders, and documents — or search across all of them and ask questions in the AI workspace.
login.accountSetupRequired: Your account needs to be finished in the Vectros Admin app before you can sign in here. Open the admin app to complete setup, then come back.
login.mfaSubtitleEmail: Enter the code we emailed you.
login.mfaSubtitleGeneric: Enter your verification code to continue.
login.mfaSubtitleSms: Enter the code we texted you.
login.mfaSubtitleTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.subtitle: Sign in to {productName}.
login.title: Sign in
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
notFound.title: Page not found
ownershipScope.help: Who owns this item. Inherit stamps your credential's full identity; Private makes it yours alone; Custom sets specific scopes (which must match your credential's identity).
ownershipScope.errorNamespace: Namespace must be 2–32 characters, start with a lowercase letter, and use only lowercase letters, digits, - or _.
ownershipScope.errorReserved: "{namespace}" is reserved and can't be used as a scope namespace.
ownershipScope.errorValue: Enter a value for this scope, or remove the row.
ownershipScope.errorDuplicate: The "{namespace}" scope is already set. Each namespace can appear once.
ownershipScope.errorTooMany: An item can carry at most {max} scopes.
ownershipScope.errorEmpty: Add at least one scope, or choose Private.
ownershipScope.uploadInheritNote: Uploaded files inherit your credential's identity.
recordDetail.archiveConfirmBody: “{title}” will be pulled from search, but kept and fully retrievable. You can restore it at any time.
recordDetail.archiveError: We couldn't archive this record. Please try again.
recordDetail.archivedBanner: This record is archived — it's excluded from search. Restore it to make it searchable again.
recordDetail.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes the record and writes a tombstone and audit entry. This can't be undone from here.
recordDetail.deleteError: We couldn't delete this record. Please try again.
recordDetail.error: We couldn't load this record. It may not exist, or you may not have access to it in this context.
recordDetail.restoreError: We couldn't restore this record. Please try again.
recordDetail.refUnresolved: This reference couldn't be resolved — the target record may not exist or isn't accessible in this context.
recordEditor.conflictBody: Someone (or another tab) saved a newer version (now version {version}). Reload to start from the latest, or overwrite to save your changes anyway.
recordEditor.conflictTitle: This record changed since you opened it
recordEditor.editMeta: Type {type} · editing version {version}. Type and schema are fixed for an existing record.
recordEditor.errorNotObject: The payload must be a JSON object (not an array or a bare value).
recordEditor.externalIdHelp: Optional stable identifier you control. Immutable after create; reusing one returns the existing record.
recordEditor.loadError: We couldn't load this record to edit. It may not exist, or you may not have access to it in this context.
recordEditor.noSchemas: This context has no schemas defined. A record is authored against a schema — ask an administrator to provision one first.
recordEditor.schemasError: We couldn't load this context's schemas. Please refresh and try again.
recordEditor.payloadHelp: The record body, validated against its schema on save. On update, this replaces the stored payload in full.
recordEditor.saveError: We couldn't save this record. Please check the payload and try again.
recordEditor.schemaHelp: The schema this record is validated against. Can't be changed after creation.
recordForm.errorEnum: Choose one of the allowed values.
recordForm.rawOnlyNote: These fields can only be edited in the raw JSON view:
records.noRecords: No records of this type in this context yet.
records.noSchemas: This context has no schemas defined. Records are authored against a schema — ask an administrator to provision one.
records.recordsError: We couldn't load records. Please refresh and try again.
records.schemasError: We couldn't load this context's schemas. Please refresh and try again.
records.subtitle: Browse the records in the selected context. Pick a type to list its records.
records.title: Records
schemaDetail.error: We couldn't load this schema. It may not exist, or you may not have access to it in this context.
schemaDetail.noFields: This schema defines no fields — records of this type are unstructured.
schemas.empty: This context has no schemas defined. Records here are unstructured — schema authoring lives in the admin app or CLI.
schemas.error: We couldn't load this context's schemas. Please refresh and try again.
schemas.subtitle: Browse the record types defined in the selected context. Schema authoring lives in the admin app.
schemas.title: Schemas
search.degraded: Some results may be missing — a search engine was temporarily unavailable. Try again for complete results.
search.prompt: Enter a query to search the records and documents in this context.
search.subtitle: Search across the records and documents in the selected context.
search.title: Search
